commands.review_summary:
The PR lowercases SDK and operator SSE EventSource header keys before merging them and adds a regression test for duplicate case-variant Authorization headers.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +59. Total +66 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can preserve both lowercase `authorization` from the SDK hook and configured `Authorization`, and the PR adds a focused regression test for that exact path; I did not run local tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair job is needed; the existing automerge flow can proceed through exact-head checks and mergeability gates.
